question_text: In a recently conducted national entrance test, boys constituted 65% of those who

options.A: ppeared for the test. Girls constituted the remaining candidates and they accounted for 60% of the qualified candidates. Which one of the following is the correct logical inference based on the information provided in the above passage?
options.B: Equal number of boys and girls appeared for the test
options.C: The number of boys who appeared for the test is less than the number of girls who
options.D: The number of boys who qualified the test is less than the number of girls who qualified
